sellerStats.name: Surprise Attack Pty Ltd DBA Fellow Traveller Games

currentGames.name: The Ouroboros King
currentGames.description: The Ouroboros King combines the strategic depth of chess with the build variety and replayability of roguelikes. Assemble a formidable army, discover powerful relics, and buy surprising gadgets to defeat the Coven.

currentGames.name: Warhammer 40K Speed Freeks
currentGames.description: High-octane combat racing in the Warhammer 40,000 universe.

upcomingGames.name: Citizen Sleeper
upcomingGames.description: Roleplaying in the ruins of interplanetary capitalism. Live the life of an escaped worker, washed-up on a lawless station at the edge of an interstellar society. Inspired by the flexibility and freedom of TTRPGs, choose your friends, escape your past and change your future.
upcomingGames.sellerName: Surprise Attack Pty Ltd DBA Fellow Traveller Games

upcomingGames.name: ROBOBEAT
upcomingGames.description: Keep your trigger finger on the pulse! In rhythm shooter ROBOBEAT, you'll play as Ace - a bounty hunter on a mission to capture robot-gone-rogue Frazzer. Wall run, slide, and shoot to your own beat using the in-game custom music editor, blasting through Frazzer's armies!

upcomingGames.name: Voidwrought
upcomingGames.description: Voidwrought is a 2D action-platformer set in a hand-drawn world of cosmic horrors. Explore the thawing ruins of the First Civilisation and strike down the gods that dwell there. Grow your powers, uncover ancient Artifacts, and expand your shrine amid the wreckage.
